name: model rationale detector requires every prompt registry entry to declare a model_rationale field
command: mkdir -p prompts/x && printf 'name: x\nmodel: sonnet\n' > prompts/x/v1.0.0.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/model-rationale.sh" --prompt prompts/x/v1.0.0.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'missing.*model_rationale' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
